prompt:
Assign GRADE certainty ratings to each evidence item below.
Ratings: HIGH (systematic review of RCTs, low heterogeneity), MODERATE (RCT with some concerns, or consistent observational), LOW (observational studies, high heterogeneity, indirect evidence), VERY_LOW (case reports, expert opinion, serious limitations).

For each item, output ONLY the number and rating, one per line:
1. HIGH
2. MODERATE
...

2. [SILVER] Source: The Role of Intermittent Fasting on Metabolic Syndrome | Statement: The PRISMA-compliant systematic review and meta-analysis included 11 studies examining IF effects on metabolic syndrome, identified from 6,451 initial
3. [GOLD] Source: The Role of Intermittent Fasting on Metabolic Syndrome | Statement: Intermittent fasting produced a mean weight reduction of 3.59 kg (95% CI: -4.59 to -2.59, p < 0.0001) in metabolic syndrome populations.
4. [SILVER] Source: The Role of Intermittent Fasting on Metabolic Syndrome | Statement: Intermittent fasting decreased BMI by 1.39 kg/m2 (95% CI: -1.87 to -0.92, p < 0.0001).
5. [GOLD] Source: The Role of Intermittent Fasting on Metabolic Syndrome | Statement: Intermittent fasting reduced LDL cholesterol by 56.22 mg/dL (95% CI: -80.14 to -32.29, p < 0.0001) in adults with metabolic syndrome.
